name: TC4 — Expired requestExpiryTimestamp — Validation
description: Verifies that a webhook whose requestExpiryTimestamp is in the past is rejected with HTTP 400 bad_request. The HMAC signature is valid; only the timestamp check fails. Pre-condition: Do not resend — generate a fresh request with a future expiry instead.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that a webhook whose requestExpiryTimestamp is in the past is rejected with HTTP 400 bad_request. The HMAC signature is valid; only the timestamp check fails. Pre-condition: Do not resend — generate a fresh request with a future expiry instead.
statusMessage:
Error: Expected HTTP 400 Bad Request

expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 400
Received: 401
